title: Add error when accessing a non-static class field from a static function
body:
IEEE 1800-2023 8.10:
> Access to non-static members or to the special this handle within the body of a static method is illegal and results in a compiler error.

Currently accessing a non-static class member (including `this`) from a static function raises no error during verilation and later results in a compilation error. The goal of this change is to error out early during verilation.
